ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "time_aest" TEXT /* Time the data was collected (AEST) */,
  "temp_celsius" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "feels_like_celsius" REAL /* Feels like temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity_percent" INTEGER /* Humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction */,
  "wind_speed_kmh" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "wind_gust_kmh" REAL /* Wind gust in km/h */,
  "pressure_hpa" REAL /* Air pressure in hPa */,
  "rainfall_mm" REAL /* Rainfall since 9 am in mm */,
  "weather_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of weather data */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit of measurement */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality level of the data */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_weather_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_type_id") REFERENCES weather_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES weather_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather type */,
  "measurement_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the weather type is measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit of measurement */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit of measurement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit of measurement */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to a standard unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
